description:
The suspect was hiding their cheats up until the final round in overtime. In round 2, they picked Blitz and enabled perfect hipfire. The clip shows that Blitz's hipfire was perfectly centered on their screen. It is also highly likely they had wall hacks, judging by their crosshair placement and knowledge about enemy positions.

The cheater was making use of a streamer mode feature to hide their Ubisoft Connect ID
Streamer mode name: PeaceDeath5739
Ubisoft name: VoicesAreQuiet

Match ID: 80648a66-242e-4d85-bbc1-13c07de98996
Time: 11th of August, 00:43 CEST
